original: The tarratch slaver stands about 5' 10\" and is dressed in sleek purple armor that clings to their willowy, graceful form. She has an eerie, elfin, androgynous attractiveness from which it is impossible to tell their sex. Only the football-sized insect abdomen that hangs over her ass is there to tell you she’s female.\n\nShe is helmetless, black hair and pupil-less eyes bared to the air, which is presumably so her ruff of moth-like feathers can flutter freely. They buzz and shimmer with strange colors that seem to dip in and out of existence, constantly disintegrating and reforming into unsettling patterns. She moves with a light-footed grace which makes her seem she’s just on the edge of bursting into flight.
